case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ELIZABETH SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED JUL-29-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, ELIZABETH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, ELIZABETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 640 FRANCISCO STREET, #1212, S.F. CA. 94133, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
